prati-√śru P. -śṛṇoti, to hear, listen,  RV. i, 25, 20  (Ā. 3. sg. śṛṇve, ‘to be heard’ or ‘audible’ i, 169, 7 );
to listen, give ear to (gen.),  Vajracch. ;
to assure, agree, promise anything (acc.)
to any one (gen. or dat.),  RV.  &c. &c.:
Desid. -śuśrūṣati, to wish to promise,  Pāṇ. i, 3, 59.
